sources.name: POE2DB
sources.notes: Use for game data such as gems, items, modifiers, passives, and datamined changes. Respect site terms and cache snapshots with timestamps.

sources.name: Path of Exile 2 Wiki
sources.notes: Use as secondary reference for mechanics, item pages, class pages, and patch context.

sources.name: User Test Notes
sources.notes: Personal observations, boss kills, mapping speed, deaths, and budget notes can be added as evidence.
